overview: A pattern-matching puzzle game with progressive levels, score tracking, and stat persistence. Players match tiles to clear the board and advance through increasingly difficult levels.
features: Pattern-matching tile game board (4x4 and 5x5 grids)
Progressive level system with increasing difficulty
Move counter and score tracking during gameplay
Level complete and game over screens
Persistent stats: best score, highest level, total games played
Home screen, pause overlay, and full game flow navigation
Responsive layout for desktop and mobile
